content: Autopsy Report: Deceased: Ramesh Das, Male, 58. Cause of Death: Cardiac arrest. Toxicology Report: Presence of lethal dose of curare alkaloid (natural poison) in bloodstream. No prior medical history of cardiac condition. No signs of struggle. Note found in pocket: 'They know I know.' Death ruled suicide by local police, but forensic evidence indicates poisoning. Time of death: Between 22:00 and 00:00 on 17/07/2021. No fingerprints on poison container. Poison likely administered via food or drink. No suspects identified yet. Case referred to CBI.
